market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: DTCC to use Chainlink to power 24/7 collateral management network
articles.description: The world’s largest post-trade infrastructure provider will integrate Chainlink technology into its tokenized collateral platform ahead of a Q4 2026 launch.

articles.title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
articles.description: Early-stage venture firm A* Capital just took the wraps off its $450 million Fund III.

articles.title: WAIB Summit Monaco 2026 returns: the world’s most exclusive gathering for digital assets & AI
articles.description: Following the resounding success of its 2025 edition, WAIB Summit Monaco proudly announces its return on June 9–10, 2026, at the prestigious One Monte-Carlo, located in the heart of Monaco’s iconic Casino Square.

articles.title: Latest version of crypto market structure bill raises eyebrows ahead of Senate markup
articles.description: Some lawmakers continue to push for ethics provision in the bill as bipartisan support is necessary for the CLARITY Act to pass a Senate floor vote.

articles.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
articles.description: Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.

articles.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
articles.description: OpenAI's CEO recalls a "particularly hair-raising" conversation with the SpaceX founder.

articles.title: XRP traders say bullishness ‘growing’ as ETFs log largest inflow since January
articles.description: XRP analysts highlighted the potential for a sustained price rally, fueled by strong institutional demand and a strong technical structure.

articles.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
articles.description: The company named Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Pachamama Capital, Lionheart Ventures, Hiive, Forge Global, Sydecar and Upmarket as companies that are not authorized to provide access to buy or sell its shares.

articles.title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
articles.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

articles.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
articles.description: The move comes after billions in losses from phishing attacks and wallet drains, with Ethereum pushing to make transaction approvals safer and easier to understand.

articles.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
articles.description: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.

articles.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote
articles.description: Warsh’s confirmation to the Fed board positions the crypto-linked investor to replace Jerome Powell as chair amid inflation and digital asset policy debates.

articles.title: Ethereum derivatives unfazed by DeFi hacks: Can ETH hit $2.6K next?
articles.description: ETH futures and options signal quiet confidence among pros despite macro headwinds and DeFi exploits, keeping the $2,600 price target in play.

articles.title: Everything Google announced at its Android Show, from Googlebooks to vibe-coded widgets
articles.description: Google unveiled its new AI-first Googlebooks laptops, more agentic Gemini features, vibe-coded Android widgets, Gemini in Chrome, refreshed Android Auto, and more ahead of I/O.

articles.title: The AI legal services industry is heating up — Anthropic is getting in on the action
articles.description: Anthropic's new tools are designed to help law firms automate specific clerical functions — things like document search and review, case law resources, deposition prep, document drafting, and other related areas.

articles.title: Google adds Gemini-powered dictation to Gboard, which could be bad news for dictation startups
articles.description: Google's transcription feature will initially launch with Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones.

articles.title: Android adds a feature to stop you from doomscrolling
articles.description: Google’s new Android feature, Pause Point, forces you to wait before opening distracting apps in an effort to curb addictive scrolling habits.

articles.title: Google unveils Googlebooks, a new line of AI-native laptops
articles.description: The company says Googlebooks, which are launching this fall, are the first laptops designed from the ground up for Gemini Intelligence to offer personal and proactive help.

articles.title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
articles.description: The new feature will first launch on the latest Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel phones this summer.

articles.title: Google brings agentic AI and vibe-coded widgets to Android
articles.description: Gemini Intelligence will also include Gboard based dictation and form filling capabilities
